text:
is the widow of Nile Dok and mother of their three children.

History

Marie met Nile Dok and Erwin Smith at a bar an undetermined number of years ago while they were both in the Training Corps. Both men fell in love with her, but Nile chose to join the Military Police Brigade so he could protect her and Erwin decided to continue with his plans to join the Survey Corps.

Story

Royal Government arc

Marie is expecting her third child with Nile Dok. At this time she is living with their children in Wall Rose.
